dialogs.script:
say: Daddy! You came!
say: This nice person told me you were coming!

say: Have you already told my dad?
say: Please hurry! I'm still waiting here...

say: Oh come on...
say: You're a bad person!
say: Fine... will you at least tell him now?
choice: Will you tell him I'm safe?
clearflag: quest1_refused_cici
setflag: quest1_found_cici

say: ...
say: I'm lost...
say: I can't find my way back home.
say: Can you tell my dad I'm okay?
setflag: quest1_refused_cici
choice: Will you tell him I'm safe?
clearflag: quest1_refused_cici
setflag: quest1_found_cici
